rooms.name: Prison Entrance
rooms.description: A cracked stairway descends into the ancient underground prison.

events.data: The stone door seals shut behind you. Somewhere below, an escape tunnel waits.

rooms.name: Guard Hall
rooms.description: Rusty chains hang from the walls where skeletal guards still patrol.

rooms.name: Storage Cell
rooms.description: Broken crates and forgotten supplies fill this damp prison cell.

rooms.name: Bone Pit
rooms.description: A pit of old bones covers the floor, hiding pressure plates beneath.

rooms.name: Warden Chamber
rooms.description: The ruined office of the prison warden contains a passage carved behind a shelf.

rooms.name: Hidden Escape Tunnel
rooms.description: A narrow tunnel leads upward toward cold night air and freedom.

events.data: You crawl through the hidden escape tunnel and leave the prison behind.
